notes: Exceptional execution. All key metrics match expected values precisely: national avg $6,510/payee, projected future liability $3.15B, top 3 avg-payout states (CO $9,711, HI $9,643, WA $9,224), top 3 deferred (NY 40,592, CA 35,564, PA 34,285), top 3 projected liability (CA $285M, NY $266M, OH $227M). Report provides all three ranking dimensions with clear explanation of how high liability results from combining large deferred populations with above-average state payouts. Analysis section identifies key drivers: military presence, federal employment hubs, defense centers, population scale. Includes deferred-to-current ratio analysis (D.C. 569%, New Jersey 106.6%), methodology notes, and caveats. Professional markdown formatting with tables, logical sections (national summary → three rankings → 5-part analysis → methodology). Agent code (analyze.py, gen_report.py, check.py) demonstrates sound data parsing and calculation approach. No significant weaknesses identified.
